/CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:RONNIE WAGNER APPEARS ON BEHALF OF SFPD LEGAL DIVISION,/MO DENIED/X:ORDER FOR DESTRUCTION OF SEIZED OXYCODONESIGNED AND FILED,/
